title: dodonaea viscosa var. spatulata
intro: Dodonaea viscosa var. spatulata, also known as the 'Spurred Dodonaea', is a variety of the Dodonaea viscosa plant, a species of flowering plant in the family Sapindaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Dodonaea viscosa var. spatulata include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial activity against certain bacteria and fungi. It is commonly prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and has been used in traditional medicine for its purported health benefits.
